title: Tarot Card Reading
seoDescription: Free online tarot card reading. Draw single or three-card spreads for insight and guidance. Major Arcana cards with detailed meanings. For entertainment purposes.
step1Desc: Think about a question or area of your life you want guidance on. Clear your mind and focus.
step2Desc: Choose single card for quick insight or three-card spread for past/present/future reading.
step3Desc: Each card reveals a unique message. Cards are drawn randomly for an authentic experience.
faq1A: This is a randomized digital tarot experience for entertainment and self-reflection purposes.
faq2A: Yes, focus on open-ended questions about life, relationships, career, or personal growth.
faq3A: 22 Major Arcana cards including The Fool, The Magician, The Lovers, Death, The World, and more.
